issues.description: Login tests are flaky - some tests fail due to 'Logging in...' spinner hanging after button click. The auth API works correctly (verified via curl), but Playwright tests occasionally timeout waiting for user-info-bar. This appears to be network/timing-related, not a code bug.

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user mobiletest@test.com with unlimited subscription

Login tests have intermittent flakiness not related to code bugs.
